uplink.description: Data report 0x01: temperature, humidity, CO2, shock event
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected authored from our normalization and cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (Temp 25.38, Humi 68, CO2 400, Volt 3.6). battery=byte3/10; air.co2 raw ppm; shockEvent surfaced as camelCase extra.

uplink.description: Data report 0x01: low battery flag, negative temperature, elevated CO2
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; byte3=0xA5 sets the low-battery high bit (0x25=37 -> 3.7 V, lowBattery true). Temp raw 0xFF26 two's-complement -> -2.18 C, Humi 0x12C0=4800 -> 48, CO2 0x0320=800, ShockEvent 5. Cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: fPort 7 config response is not a measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic input (upstream example shape); fPort 7 carries config responses, not measurements.

uplink.description: reportType 0x00 device-info frame carries no measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic input (upstream example shape); reportType 0x00 is a startup/device-info frame (SW/HW version + datecode), no measurement.

uplink.description: reportType 0x03 (PM/TVOC, other R718UB variant) carries no CO2/climate measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic input (upstream example shape); report type 0x03 belongs to a different R718UB-series variant (PM2.5/PM10/TVOC), not the R718UBD CO2 sensor.
